summary: Frontend-only testing for timer updates and badge explanations. All features verified working correctly.

timer_updates_every_second.evidence: Timer changed from 00:00:04 to 00:00:00 over 5 seconds, confirming 1-second interval updates

timer_can_go_below_3_seconds.evidence: Multiple timers observed at 00:00:02, 00:00:01, 00:00:00 - Math.max(3) limitation removed
timer_can_go_below_3_seconds.code_verification: Math.max(0, end - now) allows timer to reach 0

badges_found.Rabatt-Badge: FOUND with description 'Zeigt den aktuellen Rabatt gegenüber dem UVP'
badges_found.Anfänger-Auktion: FOUND with description 'Nur für Nutzer mit weniger als 10 gewonnenen Auktionen'
badges_found.Gratis-Auktion: FOUND with description 'Keine Gebote erforderlich! Jeder kann kostenlos teilnehmen'
badges_found.VIP-Auktion: FOUND with description 'Exklusiv für VIP-Mitglieder. Weniger Konkurrenz, bessere Chancen!'
badges_found.Nacht-Auktion: FOUND with description 'Läuft zwischen 22:00 und 6:00 Uhr. Reduzierte Gebotskosten!'
badges_found.Erinnerung: FOUND with description 'Klicken Sie darauf um 5 Minuten vor Ende benachrichtigt zu werden'

timer_reset_on_bid.note: Timer reset to 9-11 seconds verified in backend code. Live observation showed timers at 00:00:07 range after resets.

critical_code_review_comments: LiveTimer component correctly uses setInterval with 1000ms (1 second) interval
Math.max(0, end - now) allows timer to reach 0 seconds (no Math.max(3) limitation)
InfoSidebar component has all 6 badge explanations with detailed descriptions
TrustBadges component displays all 4 trust indicators
Backend bot_last_second_bidder uses random.randint(9, 11) for timer reset
Backend place_bid uses random.randint(9, 11) for timer extension on customer bids

success_rate.frontend: 100% - all timer and badge features verified

context_for_next_testing_agent: Timer updates every second (setInterval 1000ms), can go below 3 seconds (Math.max(0) not Math.max(3)). Badge explanations sidebar shows 6 types: Rabatt-Badge, Anfänger-Auktion, Gratis-Auktion, VIP-Auktion, Nacht-Auktion, Erinnerung. Trust badges: SSL, Sichere Zahlung, Dubai Licensed, 50.000+ Nutzer. Timer resets to 9-11 seconds on bid (both bot and customer).
